_meta.purpose: Global fallback ONLY. Live bot prefers tbm_xgboost_model_v2_per_symbol_thresholds.json (whose _default.threshold=1.01 means unlisted symbols are skipped). The trainer's auto-picked threshold of 0.69 is unreliable (only 2/233775 OOF rows cross it -> WR=1.0 is an artifact of n=2).
_meta.rationale: thr=0.50 + funding_rate>0.0001 yields 52.6% WR over 266 OOF trades on the 3y rebuilt dataset. Used by the --threshold CLI override and by any symbol missing from the per-symbol JSON.
_meta.tier2_status: session and cross-asset features tried and reverted; confirmed harmful (D-only OOF WR=35.7%, E-only=47.3% on the same 3y data).
_meta.trainer_emitted_threshold_note: Ignored: only 2 OOF rows cross 0.69 -> WR=1.0 is sample-size artifact, not a real edge.
